title: 同期の桐生院トレーナー

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One evening, I see <chrname> back
to her dorm after the day's training runs a little
longer than expected. Just after we say our
goodbyes...

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Trainer <username>!
Nice to see you! Are you heading home now?

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
I see! I just saw Meek off and was thinking about
heading back to the trainer dorms myself, so...

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
If it's all right with you, why don't we go back
together?

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Unless you think that's a little too—how should I
put this—chummy? We are coworkers, after all...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We talk about various things on the way back to
the dorms.
